flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Orange Coast College rose 39% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.4k → $11.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Orange Coast College rose 35% between 2007 and 2010 ($509 → $686).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Orange Coast College rose 21% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Orange Coast College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).
